examples: The racoons knock over the rubbish bins in search of food, and strew the contents all over the ground.
Yes, strew is being turned into biofuel to power cars.
They serve it in little metal cups and strew rose leaves upon it.
Strew a few of these rose petals around your next conversation with the Lifestyle Demon of your acquaintance.
Industrialists gaze longingly across the Channel where French politicians generously strew nuclear stations, motorways and TGVs about.
